rules.rule: Objects GD/DIR/WRK must have passports, never prompts.
Telegram is an operator front, not the system center.
Provider model is part of contour lifecycle.
Every link must state sender, receiver, payload, event and proof.
Release PASS requires non-null CI/Git SHA.
mock_status and production_status must be separate.
Elements inherit role/object/contour rules; no local rules by default.
Workspace belongs to internal contour, not element.
Prose in Russian; English only technical identifiers.
Every roadmap step must have depends_on or explicit phase-order dependency.
